since_last: 33% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.80%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.23% · BTC -2.21% · Gold -1.39% · Nasdaq100 -1.32%. 33% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.80%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.80%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.64%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, TTD +4.02%, INTU +3.64%, IBM +2.54%, WDAY +2.37%. Laggards: ARM -8.16%, APP -8.15%, MRVL -6.67%, MU -5.24%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.74% at $138.42
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.74% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
